scripts.build:public: pnpm --filter customer build --outDir ../../public --emptyOutDir && pnpm --filter admin build --outDir ../../public/admin --emptyOutDir
scripts.bundle:worker: rm -rf .worker-bundle && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir=.worker-bundle --config=wrangler-build.toml && cp .worker-bundle/worker.js public/_worker.js
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:public && pnpm run bundle:worker && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy public/ --project-name=qsycommentsys --commit-dirty=true --branch=main
